## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change is needed.

## Validation

List the checks you ran and their results.

- [ ] Root typecheck or focused typecheck
- [ ] Relevant automated tests
- [ ] Relevant application build
- [ ] Manual verification where behavior or layout changed

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] I did not add credentials, tokens, private logs, real customer data, or personal account identifiers.
- [ ] New examples use fictional names and reserved domains such as `example.com`.
- [ ] New external writes, permissions, or data transfers are documented and gated appropriately.
- [ ] Documentation and tests reflect the final behavior.

## Screenshots

Include sanitized before/after images for visual changes. Remove this section when it does not apply.
